creator: luddes@hotmail.com
text:
Hello!

I have the same problem, when booting from the CD.

I tried booting with "boot -v" and it gives me some additional lines:

Mounting root from ufs:/dev/md0c
md0: invalid primary partition table: no magic
start_init: trying /sbin/init
start_init: trying /sbin/oinit
start_init: trying /sbin/init.bak
start_init: trying /sbin/sysinstall

Another "boot -v" message I get is "device configuration doesn't support
shared irq0". I have no idea if that message is related to the problem
though.

The computer is a Pentium 233 MMX with a Realtek network card, and an "Ati
Mach64-CT" graphics card.

Regards,
Ludvig Strigeus
